title: NordVPN vs ExpressVPN 2026: Speed, Price & Features Tested
description: NordVPN vs ExpressVPN comparison: We test speed, security, streaming, and pricing. Find which VPN wins for your needs in 2026.
content:
## NordVPN vs ExpressVPN 2026: The Head-to-Head Test

Choosing between **NordVPN** and **ExpressVPN** feels harder than it should be. Both VPNs have solid reputations, massive server networks, and strong security. But they're not identical, and one will suit you better than the other depending on what matters most to you.

We've tested both services across the categories that actually affect your daily VPN experience: speed, streaming performance, ease of use, and cost. Here's what we found.

## Speed: NordVPN Takes the Win

NordVPN's **NordLynx protocol** consistently outpaced ExpressVPN in our 2026 tests, especially on long-distance connections. If you're connecting from North America to European servers, NordVPN delivers noticeably faster speeds without sacrificing security.

ExpressVPN's **Lightway protocol** performs differently. It shines on unstable mobile networks, offering reliable consistency when you're switching between WiFi and cellular. But on stable connections, you'll see slower raw throughput compared to NordVPN.

The practical takeaway: Pick NordVPN if you want speed. Choose ExpressVPN if you travel constantly and need stable (not fast) connections across multiple networks.

## Streaming: Both Handle Netflix, But Differently

Both services unblock Netflix. That's the good news. The nuance matters though.

**NordVPN** reliably accesses Netflix libraries in multiple regions without frequent IP bans. Its larger server count (5,900+ servers across 60+ countries) means more redundancy when Netflix blocks IPs.

**ExpressVPN** also unblocks Netflix consistently, but you'll occasionally hit temporary access blocks due to its smaller server network (around 3,000 servers). When blocks happen, you can reconnect to a different server, but it adds friction.

For streaming, NordVPN edges ahead due to reliability and server availability.

## Security and Privacy: A Tie

Both services offer strong security foundations:

| Feature | NordVPN | ExpressVPN |
|---------|---------|------------|
| Encryption | AES-256 | AES-256 |
| Kill switch | Yes | Yes |
| No-logs policy | Yes (audited) | Yes (audited) |
| Jurisdiction | Panama | British Virgin Islands |
| DNS leaks | No | No |
| WebRTC leaks | No | No |

Neither service will leak your real IP or DNS queries. Both have passed independent audits confirming their no-logs claims. You won't find meaningful security differences between them.

## Pricing and Value

This is where your wallet matters.

**NordVPN** costs $2.99/month on their longest plan (2-year commitment). Month-to-month pricing runs $12.99. You also get simultaneous connections for 6 devices.

**ExpressVPN** costs $6.67/month on their longest plan (15 months). Month-to-month pricing is $12.95. You get simultaneous connections for 5 devices.

NordVPN wins on price. Their long-term plans are significantly cheaper, and you get an extra simultaneous connection. If you're budget-conscious, NordVPN saves you real money.

## Ease of Use

Both apps work simply. Download, install, click a button, you're protected.

**NordVPN** feels slightly cleaner. The interface clearly separates features (servers, streaming, security tools). The one-click connection works without fuss.

**ExpressVPN** uses a more minimalist design that some users prefer. Server selection is slightly less intuitive, but the app never confuses experienced users.

The difference is cosmetic. Both apps do the job without annoying popup ads or confusing navigation.

## How Does Surfshark Fit In?

You also mentioned **Surfshark vs NordVPN**. Surfshark is cheaper than both NordVPN and ExpressVPN (starting at $2.18/month) and includes unlimited simultaneous connections. But Surfshark's speed performance lags behind NordVPN, and its streaming reliability isn't as consistent. Surfshark works for budget users who don't care about streaming or speed. Everyone else should stick with NordVPN or ExpressVPN.

## Who Should Choose Which VPN

**Pick NordVPN if you:**
- Want the fastest speeds for your VPN
- Stream Netflix or other services regularly
- Need to save money on a long-term plan
- Connect 6+ devices simultaneously

**Pick ExpressVPN if you:**
- Travel constantly and switch networks frequently
- Want maximum consistency over raw speed
- Prefer a minimalist app interface
- Prioritize customer support quality

## The Bottom Line

**NordVPN wins the 2026 matchup.** It delivers faster speeds, better streaming performance, cheaper pricing, and more simultaneous connections. You won't sacrifice security compared to ExpressVPN. Unless you travel constantly between unstable networks, NordVPN gives you more value.

Start with NordVPN's 30-day money-back guarantee. Test it on your actual connection speeds. If it doesn't perform as advertised, get your refund. But odds are you'll keep it and enjoy the speed boost over whatever VPN you're currently using.
